series_metadata.series_description: Reimbursement request forms, copy of warrant, invoice and other supporting documentation used to reimburse medical providers for Sexual Assualt Forensic Examination (SAFE) kits. The SAFE program pays medical providers to cover costs of collection of evidence of sexual assualt for possible prosecution.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 2 years, provided audited, or until data is entered into online system, then destroy ; Electronic: 2 years, provided audited, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
